codeartifact.domain.CfnAbout: The `AWS::CodeArtifact::Domain` resource creates an AWS CodeArtifact domain. CodeArtifact *domains* make it easier to manage multiple repositories across an organization. You can use a domain to apply permissions across many repositories owned by different AWS accounts. For more information about domains, see the [Domain concepts information](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/codeartifact/latest/ug/codeartifact-concepts.html

codeartifact.domain.DomainName.Description: A string that specifies the name of the requested domain.

codeartifact.domain.EncryptionKey.Description: The key used to encrypt the domain.

codeartifact.domain.PermissionsPolicyDoc.Description: The document that defines the resource policy that is set on a domain.

codeartifact.domain.Tags.Description: A list of tags to be applied to the domain.
